objective: Add seek-and-ponder environment bootstrap aliases and registry metadata to the governance bootstrap contract.
scope_boundary: Modify the governance environment registry and bootstrap script for seek-and-ponder staging, local, and worktree aliases.
Add only the issue #428 structured plan and execution-scope artifacts required by the planner-boundary gate.
Permit generated graphify output if repo hooks update graph artifacts during validation.
out_of_scope: Committing .env.shared, generated .env files, Supabase anon keys, service-role keys, or other secrets.
Provisioning or mutating Supabase projects, schemas, policies, or dashboard settings.
research_summary: Issue #428 tracks a mechanical governance bootstrap gap: seek-and-ponder needs documented environment registry metadata and bootstrap aliases so staging/local/worktree env files can be generated from the operator-managed .env.shared vault without committing secrets.

sprints.name: Seek-and-ponder bootstrap registration
sprints.goal: Make the governance bootstrap recognize seek-and-ponder aliases while keeping secrets outside git.
tasks: Add the seek-and-ponder staging project to docs/ENV_REGISTRY.md.
Add seek-and-ponder staging, local, and worktree cases to scripts/bootstrap-repo-env.sh.
Validate the focused bootstrap env contract and the governance local CI gate.
Publish the PR branch after checks pass locally.
acceptance_criteria: The bootstrap script emits seek-and-ponder Supabase URL, anon key, service-role key, and environment mode placeholders from .env.shared inputs.
Worktree bootstrap execution can discover the parent governance .env.shared file.
The environment registry contains the seek-and-ponder staging Supabase project row.
No .env.shared contents, generated .env files, Supabase keys, or dashboard evidence are committed.
Final AC: local-ci-gate and GitHub PR checks pass.

specialist_reviews.focus: Planner-boundary and local-ci-gate requirements for issue #428.
specialist_reviews.summary: Confirmed the failing PR check is caused by the missing issue-specific execution scope and that the bootstrap env contract remains the focused behavioral validation.

alternate_model_review.summary: Accepted the narrow remediation: add issue #428 scope and structured plan artifacts without broadening bootstrap behavior.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #428 may update seek-and-ponder bootstrap/env registry files plus the required plan, execution-scope, and generated graphify artifacts.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run focused bootstrap and local-ci validation, push the PR branch, and confirm PR checks.

material_deviation_rules: If validation reveals missing seek-and-ponder secret names, update only the bootstrap mapping and contract coverage for those names.
If Supabase dashboard or schema changes are required, stop and open a separate seek-and-ponder implementation issue.
If any generated evidence contains secrets or raw .env.shared values, delete the evidence and rerun with redaction.
